creator: mail@axelgneiting.de
text:
The bootloader just spins a bar when AHCI is enabled, but boots in IDE moed.

Mainboard: ASUS M4A78LT-M with AMD 760G chipset.

Bootloader was installed on all five disks with
gpart bootcode -b /boot/pmbr -p /boot/gptzfsboot -i 1 ada*

I checked the version of pmbr and gptzfsboot, they are binary identical to the ones on the 9.0-RC2 memstick.

How-To-Repeat: Enable AHCI in BIOS then boot
